name: Second Time Around Veal Stew"normandy Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Granny Smith apple, peeled, cored and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
4 Kirby cucumbers, seeded and diced into 3/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the apples and sauté until they are just tender, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Stir in the apple cider and reduce the sauce to almost nothing.
4. Add the veal stew and cream, stirring well.
5. Return the cucumbers to the pot on top of the mixture.
6. Cover and steam for a minute or so until heated through.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
